summary: Restaurant website for 'Coal & Curry' deployed on the Internet Computer. User requested SEO tags to be added for better Google discoverability.
architectural_notes: Project is deployed on the Internet Computer (ICP) with a canister-based URL (https://[canister-id].icp0.io)

existing_features.title: Update frontend/index.html to include a descriptive page title ('Coal & Curry | Authentic Chettinad Restaurant'), a meta description summarizing the restaurant, relevant keywords meta tag, Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image), and Twitter Card meta tags so the site is discoverable and renders rich previews when shared.

Ensure the existing SEOHead component (frontend/src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx) is used on every page (Home, About, Menu, Offers, Gallery, Blog, Contact, Reservation, Loyalty) with accurate, unique page-level title, meta description, canonical URL, Open Graph, and Twitter Card values tailored to each page's content.

Verify and update the existing robots.txt (frontend/public/robots.txt) and sitemap.xml (frontend/public/sitemap.xml) to ensure all public pages are included with accurate URLs (using the canonical domain), correct priorities, and up-to-date lastmod dates so Google can crawl and index the site efficiently.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add SEO tags (title, meta description, keywords) to Coal & Curry website
